summary: Comprehensive testing of Aashwashan mental health website completed. All 35 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working correctly including: 6 self-assessment tools, Blog page with India Mental Health Updates, Footer without logo, How We Help with 4 categories, Jitsi meeting links after booking, Therapist login/dashboard, and all navigation links.

self_assessment_page.details: All 6 assessments present: PHQ-9, GAD-7, DASS-21, K6, PSS, WHO-5. Start buttons work, questions display correctly, answer options clickable

blog_page.details: Shows 'Mental Health Updates in India' title, Featured Updates section with Budget 2025 and NIMHANS content

footer_no_logo.details: Footer has NO logo image, only 'Aashwashan' text as required

how_we_help_section.details: 4 structured categories found: Emotional Challenges, Worry & Anxiety, Life Transitions, Self-Help Tools

booking_with_jitsi.details: Booking flow works, Jitsi meeting link (https://meet.jit.si/aashwashan-session-...) displayed after payment confirmation

therapist_login.details: Therapist login at /therapist/login works with therapist@aashwashan.com / Therapist123! - redirects to dashboard

navigation_links.details: All navigation links working: Home, About Us, Resources, Community, Blog, Join Our Team, Contact Us

teal_theme.details: 170 elements with teal/cyan theme classes, 68 gradient backgrounds - consistent teal theme across all pages

session_pricing.details: Session pricing visible in booking modal: 30 min ₹999, 45 min ₹1400, 60 min ₹1600

backend_apis.details: All 35 backend tests passed: auth, admin, blogs, community, appointments, payments

seed_data_creation: Test appointments and community posts created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly: 1) 6 self-assessment tools (PHQ-9, GAD-7, DASS-21, K6, PSS, WHO-5) 2) Blog page redesigned for India Mental Health Updates 3) Footer has no logo (text only) 4) How We Help has 4 categories 5) Jitsi meeting links appear after booking 6) Therapist portal with calendar system 7) All navigation links functional 8) Teal theme consistent across all pages

mocked_apis_list: Razorpay payment integration (returns mock orders/verification for testing)
